caption: The video features two men dressed in traditional Nigerian attire, shaking hands in what appears to be a formal setting, possibly an office or a conference room. The man on the left is wearing a white outfit with a patterned cap, while the man on the right is dressed in a similar white outfit but with a more colorful and ornate cap. Both individuals are smiling, suggesting a cordial and positive interaction. The background includes wooden paneling and a door, indicating an indoor environment. The text overlay at the bottom of the screen reads "NIGERIA NEEDS ME - BOLA TINUBU," which implies that the video is related to a political statement or announcement by Bola Tinubu. The logo and website address in the corner suggest that this footage is being broadcasted by PlusTV Africa.
